name: Metal Gear
description: Kojima's stealth action series about soldiers, nuclear deterrence, conspiracies, and living weapons.

eras.title: MSX Origin Era
eras.description: Original 2D stealth games that established the core formula.

eras.title: Solid Era
eras.description: Cinematic 3D period that defined the franchise's global identity.

eras.title: Late Kojima Era
eras.description: Final Kojima-led period from MGS4 through The Phantom Pain.

eras.title: Post-Kojima Era
eras.description: Konami-controlled legacy period after Kojima's departure.

notes: NES Metal Gear and Snake's Revenge are part of the franchise history, but the MSX line is the creative spine.
